prompt: Enhance the brighter regions in the heatmap and dim the darker ones to emphasize surface variation.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 (the photorealistic grayscale moon image). Using image 2 (the color-coded heatmap of the moon) as a reference for intensity and topographical data, enhance the brighter lunar surface regions and dim the darker ones. Specifically, increase the brightness and local contrast of areas in image 1 that correspond to the yellow and cyan regions in image 2. Conversely, decrease the brightness and local contrast of areas in image 1 that correspond to the red and orange regions in image 2. The goal is to generate a photorealistic moon image with pronounced surface variations and emphasized topographical relief.
objects: Emphasized topographical relief on the moon
